criteria.name: Personalized Content Recommendation
criteria.description: The app provides personalized content recommendations based on user preferences, viewing history, and other data points, enhancing user engagement and content discovery.

criteria.name: AI-Generated Content
criteria.description: The app uses AI to generate content such as short drama series, graphic novels, audiobooks, or music, offering a diverse range of entertainment options.

criteria.name: Content Variety and Genre Diversity
criteria.description: The app offers a wide variety of content genres, from romance to thrillers, graphic novels, and personalized music, catering to diverse user interests.

criteria.name: AI-Powered Editing and Enhancement
criteria.description: The app utilizes AI to edit and enhance media, such as refining dialogue in films, removing silences in videos, or generating realistic sound effects.

criteria.name: Interactive and Engaging User Experience
criteria.description: The app incorporates interactive elements such as virtual dating, AI companions, customizable characters, and gamified retention strategies to keep users engaged and returning daily.
